name_en: 🔥 Mini soft grained calfskin Pebble Bucket Tote Pebble 👜 Merges pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design style 💄 Creating a unique and innovative handbag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and practical functions, 👄 Adjustable shoulder strap length and suitable for multiple carrying ways, unique twisted structure complements subtle details. 👛 This mini version is made of soft grained calfskin. 😻 Can be carried crossbody, on the shoulder or handheld *Adjustable removable shoulder strap *Magnetic snap closure *Inner pocket *Synthetic leather lining * 🔥 Anagram engraved pebble 💥
